raw_consumer_statement: I disputed a unauthorized charge from XX/XX/year> for {$140.00}. Citi looked into this and the vendor ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ) said we received the merchandise to our HOME ADDRESS so they reversed the charge back to me. I then took it upon myself to look into delivery options from XXXX XXXX XXXX and they do not offer shipping to home address and will only email the tickets to the purchaser. The email address used was not mine or my wife 's so that is how they stole our identity and purchased tickets ... nothing was sent to my home address and I contacted Citi and explained this to them but they still won't reverse the charge and have delayed this for almost 6 months now and are charging late fees and interest and constantly calling me to make payment. I have called them many times asking what else they need from me to prove this was an unauthorized payment and they say they are looking into it... nothing ever gets done and I am fed up with them treating me like a criminal as we had 4 charges total that were unauthorized on XX/XX/year> and they deemed 3 of the 4 charges not mine but keep trying to get me to pay for this 4th charge even though our identity was stolen on this date and they all used my wife 's name and address but a different email address, not ours.
